title: Edible Milk
description:
A bucket of milk finally provides satiety and saturation!

No dependencies required.

The mod is light-weight (latest ≈ 8 kb)
body:
This mod modifies a bucket of milk, so that it fills up hunger and gives saturation.

Currently this mod provides **half of the food bar of hunger and saturation**.

It also doesn't require any extra dependencies, so no need to worry about it.
